final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing illustration for a children's picture book forest scene.

Style/medium: needs a "儿童绘本" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Eric Carle collage illustration, Beatrix Potter watercolor tradition, Studio Ghibli background art; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a rabbit playing cello, a squirrel playing flute, and other cute forest animals having a concert
Scene/backdrop: must include a fairytale mushroom house and a rainbow
Lighting/mood: needs a cheerful, whimsical atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs bright, vivid, childlike tones — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
